name: Expense group management
description: Implement expense group (event) CRUD. Backend: POST /api/v1/groups (create; name required, optional description, optional budget amount, optional start/end dates), GET /api/v1/groups (list active groups for household), PATCH /api/v1/groups/:id (update; admin or member if settings allow), POST /api/v1/groups/:id/archive (admin-only). Frontend: Groups list page with group cards (name, total spend, budget progress bar if budget set), Create Group form, Edit Group form. Per docs/product-specs/expense-grouping.md. Does NOT include assigning expenses to groups (feat-023) or group-level analytics.
